name: Baja Blintzes
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. In a small saucepan, melt butter. Stir in flour. Cook and stir for 2 minutes. Stir in stock and milk. Cook, stirring constantly over medium heat until thickened; remove from heat. Stir in onion, chilies, salt, and cheese. Arrange half of a sliced egg and one rounded tablespoon ham on each tortilla. Spoon about two tablespoons of cheese sauce over the ham. Fold both sides of each tortilla over the filling, then fold the top and bottom to slightly overlap in the center. Place filled tortillas, folded-side down, in a shallow baking pan. Cover with foil. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 12 minutes or until heated through. Serve warm.
Makes 6 servings.
